meta.title: TRL Racing — TorqueLINE Racing
meta.description: TRL Racing is a South Korean sim racing team competing on iRacing, growing together by sharing experience and data. Race Together. Improve Together.

hero.intro: A South Korean sim racing team growing together on iRacing by sharing experience and data.

about.label: ABOUT
about.title: WHO WE ARE
about.desc: A South Korean sim racing team that races and grows together

about.title: About
about.identity: TRL Racing is a South Korean sim racing team whose goal is to race together and grow together. We are not a team chasing lap times alone — what matters most to us is the process of becoming better drivers by sharing experience and data.
about.activity: Centered on iRacing, we compete in a wide range of races and endurance events, built on teamwork, consistency, and a clean racing culture. Every race is a new challenge, and we deliver our best results through thorough preparation and steady practice.
about.culture: TRL Racing values passion over current skill. We respect each other, learn together, and believe we become a stronger team by pushing past our limits. We will keep challenging ourselves to compete beyond Korea, on the world stage.
about.philosophy1: We practice and race together rather than playing alone, considering the whole team's results and growth while fulfilling each role.
about.philosophy2: Beyond lap times and standings, we value the process of improvement — sharing driving experience, strategy, setups, and data to help each other get faster.
about.philosophy3: We respect rival drivers and maintain a fair, clean racing culture, building results through consistent and responsible driving.
about.activity1: Team training and competition based on iRacing's cars, circuits, official races, and community events.
about.activity2: In long endurance races we execute team-level racing: driver cooperation, consistent lap times, stint management, and strategy.
about.activity3: We share lap times, telemetry, racing lines, setups, and strategy to raise the whole team's competitiveness.
about.values: Teamwork · Growth · Consistency · Respect · Clean Racing
about.vision: To grow into a sim racing team that competes on the world stage, beyond South Korea.

member.listDesc: The on-road drivers of TRL Racing

news.desc: Team notices, race announcements, and activity updates

join.title: JOIN US
join.headline: Looking for drivers to race with us
join.desc: TRL Racing values passion and the will to improve over current skill. We are waiting for drivers who practice consistently, embrace feedback, and grow together with the team.
join.condition1: Drivers who can stay active on iRacing
join.condition2: Drivers willing to share experience and data with the team
join.condition3: Drivers who race clean and with respect
join.contactDesc: Reach out through the channels below.
